meaning: What fraction of captured images are usable? Corrupted images remove coverage — below 30 triggers the critical drone gate.
gate_action: Sets image_capture_score = 0 (no recoverable survey data). Raises FLAG: CRITICAL_IMAGE_FAILURE.
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-DRONE-2: existing hard gate (image_validity < 30). Confirmed chain-level critical-path.

meaning: What fraction of valid images have GPS coordinates? Images without geotags cannot be used in photogrammetric reconstruction.
Do the actual image positions prove sufficient overlap exists? Computed from real EXIF positions, independent of any GCS log.
Are images in a format that preserves full radiometric data? DNG and RAW formats preserve full sensor depth.
How stable was camera exposure throughout the entire flight session? High exposure variance means radiometric inconsistency.
Did the rover record throughout the entire flight with adequate buffer before and after?
gate_action: Sets drone_score = 0 (HARD GATE — Q-DRONE-2 lock v2.1). Raises FLAG: RINEX_CRITICAL_GAP. PPK has no rover observations during flight; output is unrecoverable.
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-DRONE-2: promoted to chain-level hard gate. Rover coverage gap during flight makes PPK fundamentally impossible.

meaning: How strong and clean was the satellite signal during the flight? C/N0 below 30dBHz indicates degraded signal.
Is dual-frequency GNSS data available? Enables ionospheric correction critical for PPK precision.
Were there any critical recording gaps? A gap over 60 seconds during a short drone flight effectively breaks PPK.
gate_action: HARD RULE: Sets rover_continuity_score = 0. Raises FLAG: RINEX_CRITICAL_GAP.

meaning: How quickly did the rover reach stable satellite tracking after recording began?
How good was satellite geometry during the actual flight window? PDOP magnifies all measurement errors.
What fraction of the planned survey area was actually flown? An unflown area is unflown data.
gate_action: Sets drone_score = 0 (HARD GATE — Q-DRONE-2 lock v2.1). Raises FLAG: COVERAGE_GAP. Mission area not covered; deliverable is fundamentally incomplete.
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-DRONE-2: promoted to chain-level hard gate. Mission coverage gap means survey area is not actually surveyed.

meaning: How closely did the achieved GSD match what was planned? GSD determines the resolution of the deliverable.
How closely did achieved overlap match planned overlap? Insufficient overlap creates reconstruction gaps.
How consistently did the drone maintain the planned altitude?
Were wind conditions within safe operating limits during the survey?
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-DRONE-4: introduces INDICATOR-LEVEL null pattern. When Open-Meteo API unavailable, indicator returns null + WIND_API_FALLBACK flag. Does NOT score 100 (don't make up data) or 0 (not a failure — just unavailable). Composite scoring at block level treats indicator null as "not measured."

meaning: How much did altitude fluctuate during the survey cruise lines?
Did the drone complete all planned waypoints?
gate_action: vibration_score and gimbal_score from FDR are now ACTIVE (BIN supplies them — no longer disabled).

meaning: Where did the calibration parameters originate? Physically measured calibration is ground truth.
gate_action: Shares logical name with L3I_IMG_007 but uses DIFFERENT thresholds (raises additional flags).

meaning: Does the calibration file match the actual camera hardware used in this survey?
gate_action: Shares logical name with L3I_IMG_006 but uses DIFFERENT thresholds. See sheet 05.

meaning: How recently was this calibration performed or verified?
